title: AXON - 04/07
html:
TRADE ID: 202604070909
AXON - 04/07
Mid Day Market Update

Markets are -.6% anticipating volatility into the 8pm Iran deadline. This note is to focus on AXON (Taser) that is falling 7% more today. It makes for a compelling start of a bullish position.

The stock has excellent fundamentals, so I am interested in catching a falling knife (cautiously). My trades will be longer term so that they are slow on purpose. This would suit a slower investor than a scalper. I took the credit put spread below, and I also took a credit call spread to turn it into an iron condor for December. If I win it would be a huge yield. The credit call spread if you want it is at 750/760 and it paid me .82 additional credit.

Trade Alert: AXON (Bullish / Neutral) Note: Skip these setups if you are already long AXON.

+ Setup: Buy AXON shares at 383.8. Starter position and I would leave to more than double my order over time.

+ Setup: Sell the Dec 18 230/220 credit put spread for a 2.5. This catches the falling knife while leaving lines of support to play out. Note: Slow trade catching the falling knife on a really bad day after a long fall. This is not likely a bottom so using a credit put spread is ideal.

+ Setup: Sell the Dec 18 210 Put for a 13.5. This slower approach leaves more room for error. It commits you to owning shares at 210 with a breakeven of 196.5. Requires roughly 2500 in margin to hold. Note: Can be modified into a credit put spread for smaller accounts.

Nic
